name: nz_legal_nlp_model_fine_tuning_pipeline
repo_side_deliverables: task examples for MLM, citation, deontic, entity, argument, and stance tasks
dry-run fine-tuning CLI and shell entrypoints

external_gates.notes: Dry runs, CPU smoke tests, and job specs do not satisfy this gate. It requires a completed Legal-BERT MLM run on real NZ legal/Hansard data with held-out perplexity improvement.
At least three Tier-2 model fine-tunes must complete on a suitable accelerated or otherwise validated backend.
Fixture metrics, synthetic labels, and untrained model specs do not satisfy this gate.
Publication requires explicit Hub push evidence and model cards. The default dry-run command surfaces intentionally do not push.

local_validation.name: focused Track 20 tests
local_validation.command: pixi run pytest -p no:tach -p no:cacheprovider -q tests/test_track20_runtime.py tests/test_track20_evidence.py tests/test_semantic_finetune_dry_run.py tests/test_training_data.py tests/test_training_eval.py tests/test_track20_external_gate_manifest.py

local_validation.name: Track 20 lint
local_validation.command: pixi run ruff check src/nlp_policy_nz/training src/nlp_policy_nz/semantic/finetune.py tests/test_track20_runtime.py tests/test_track20_evidence.py tests/test_track20_external_gate_manifest.py tests/test_semantic_finetune_dry_run.py tests/test_training_data.py tests/test_training_eval.py
